repo.description: Javascript codes you will always need  & Cheatsheets

terms.context_snippet: Most of you probably already know them, lodash/underscore was built to provide utility functions for common tasks in Javascript. But some you don’t want to install a package for small use case. So I created this file to provide a quick access to the most used functions. I hope y…
